heroMessages.title: FOODIE - Delicious Meals Delivered
heroMessages.description: Satisfy your cravings with our mouth-watering burgers, pizzas, and local favourites, delivered hot and fresh to your doorstep.

heroMessages.title: Taste the Best Burgers in Town
heroMessages.description: Juicy, flame-grilled burgers made with 100% beef, fresh veggies, and our secret sauce. Perfect for any craving!

heroMessages.title: Authentic Italian Pizzas
heroMessages.description: Wood-fired pizzas topped with premium ingredients, gooey mozzarella, and rich tomato sauce. Order your favourite today!

heroMessages.title: Local Ghanaian Favourites
heroMessages.description: Enjoy authentic jollof rice, waakye, banku with tilapia, and other local delights made fresh daily.

heroMessages.title: Quick Bites & Snacks
heroMessages.description: From crispy chicken wings to loaded fries and fresh spring rolls, we've got your snack cravings covered.

heroMessages.title: Family Meal Deals
heroMessages.description: Feed the whole family with our value-packed meal combos. Great food, great prices, and great taste!

heroMessages.title: Fresh Ingredients Daily
heroMessages.description: We source only the freshest ingredients to prepare every meal with love and care. Quality you can taste!

heroMessages.title: Fast & Reliable Delivery
heroMessages.description: Hot food delivered fast! Track your order in real-time and get notified when your food arrives.
